introSection: Rewind Racers is a steel shuttle roller coaster at Adventure City in Anaheim, California, USA. The ride was built by Gerstlauer and themed by R&R Creative Amusement Designs. At a cost of $2 million, it is the largest investment in the park's history.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
By May 2014, the ride's hardware had arrived at the park.

Rewind Racers was set to open in 2014, but this was delayed to 2015.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 7 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders.

sections.title: Theme
sections.content: Theming design is being handled by R&R Creative Amusement Designs, a company which has designed other Adventure City rides in the past. The theme is based on drag-racing.

fullText:
Rewind Racers is a steel shuttle roller coaster at Adventure City in Anaheim, California, USA. The ride was built by Gerstlauer and themed by R&R Creative Amusement Designs. At a cost of $2 million, it is the largest investment in the park's history.

By May 2014, the ride's hardware had arrived at the park.

Rewind Racers was set to open in 2014, but this was delayed to 2015.



Single train with 7 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders.

Theming design is being handled by R&R Creative Amusement Designs, a company which has designed other Adventure City rides in the past. The theme is based on drag-racing.
